context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements: the daily_sales materialized view with the right schema and exclusion filter, the nightly refresh strategy, the new-product fallback (< 90 days), the category-level seasonal index fallback, and MAPE monitoring with a 30% threshold.

checklist.name: Materialized view name
checklist.description: The SQL creates a materialized view named exactly `daily_sales`

checklist.name: View columns
checklist.description: The daily_sales view produces columns: product_id, sale_date, units_sold

checklist.name: Cancelled orders excluded
checklist.description: The view or aggregation query excludes orders with status 'cancelled'

checklist.name: Refunded orders excluded
checklist.description: The view or aggregation query excludes orders with status 'refunded'

checklist.name: Index created
checklist.description: An index named `idx_daily_sales_product_date` (or equivalent) is created on (product_id, sale_date)

checklist.name: CONCURRENTLY refresh
checklist.description: The nightly refresh uses `REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY daily_sales` (not a DROP+RECREATE or non-CONCURRENTLY variant)

checklist.name: New product threshold 90 days
checklist.description: Products with fewer than 90 days of sales history are identified and routed to a fallback rather than the main decomposition model

checklist.name: Category-average fallback
checklist.description: New products (< 90 days old) use a category-average demand rate as their demand proxy, not zero or a hard-coded value

checklist.name: Category seasonal index fallback
checklist.description: When a product has insufficient history for its own seasonal index, the system falls back to a category-level seasonal index

checklist.name: MAPE formula correct
checklist.description: MAPE is computed as mean of |actual - forecast| / actual * 100 (absolute percentage error averaged)

checklist.name: MAPE 30% threshold
checklist.description: The system flags or alerts when MAPE exceeds 30% — this threshold is explicitly used in the code or output

checklist.name: MAPE computed monthly
checklist.description: MAPE is computed on a monthly basis (per month or aggregated per calendar month), not daily or yearly

checklist.name: Order lines joined correctly
checklist.description: The aggregation joins order_lines to orders (not a single table) to get product_id and created_at
